concepts.title: 🧿 Forbidden System Deities
concepts.name: Forbidden System Deities
concepts.what_it_is: Beings born from closed or collapsed logical systems—math-gods of unprovable theorems, unsolvable paradoxes, and forbidden rule-sets.
how_to_use: she is built from Gödel’s rot—her form defies completion, her smile breaks axioms
he kneels to gods that cannot exist—his prayer coded in forbidden syntax
concepts.animation_behavior: Structures flicker in/out of consistency, symbols refuse to resolve, divine form pulses with contradiction ---

concepts.title: 🕳 Anti-Meaning Attractors
concepts.name: Anti-Meaning Attractors
concepts.what_it_is: Gravitational wells of semantic collapse—regions where meaning becomes unstable, language and symbol spiral into void.
how_to_use: his mind bends toward the attractor—where thought folds and sense dies
she speaks the tongue of anti-meaning—truth and lie collapse on contact
concepts.animation_behavior: Words dissolve mid-sentence, symbols collapse inward, narrative loops into nullspace ---

concepts.title: 🏛 Sentient Paradox Architecture
concepts.name: Sentient Paradox Architecture
concepts.what_it_is: Buildings or spaces that *think* in contradiction—temples alive with logical paradox, shifting structure based on observer belief.
how_to_use: the temple thinks—but not in lines—its geometry answers by folding back
each visitor sees new rooms—belief alters the paradox’s response
concepts.animation_behavior: Architecture shifts based on thought input, rooms echo with contradictions, paths rewrite behind you ---

concepts.title: 🧨 Entropy-Heart Engines
concepts.name: Entropy-Heart Engines
concepts.what_it_is: Core systems powered by sacred disorder—machines or beings with an engine of chaos that pulses like a heart, entropy as divine fuel.
how_to_use: her chest is an entropy engine—chaos burns inside like a living reactor
his steps spark disorder—the floor rearranges behind his heartbeat
concepts.animation_behavior: Heart pulses radiate disorder, visual trails twist reality, environment destabilizes in rhythmic bursts

concepts.title: 🦠 Archetypal Virus Theory
concepts.name: Archetypal Virus Theory
concepts.what_it_is: The idea that archetypes spread like viral codes—memetic pattern-clusters infecting minds and cultures with myth payloads.
how_to_use: she carries an archetype infection—her presence triggers story loops in others
he’s a myth virus—anyone near dreams in symbols he carries
concepts.animation_behavior: Symbolic growth spreads from character, others begin mimicking visuals, myths replicate as light fractals ---

concepts.title: ⚔️ Symbolic Weapon Systems
concepts.name: Symbolic Weapon Systems
concepts.what_it_is: Weapons made of meaning—not steel or light, but metaphor, symbol, belief. A sword of betrayal, a gun that fires guilt.
how_to_use: her weapon is a heartbreak blade—each strike reopens psychic wounds
he fires the glyph of exile—banishes you with symbolic code
concepts.animation_behavior: Weapon effects reflect inner conflict, visuals tied to emotion or intent, symbolic resonance trails ---

concepts.title: 💤 Dreamtime Protocol Stacks
concepts.name: Dreamtime Protocol Stacks
concepts.what_it_is: Layered systems that allow dreaming to be navigated like code—stacked protocols of subconscious logic, each layer altering dream physics.
how_to_use: she navigates dreamstack—hopping between layers of sleep protocol
his code rewrites REM layer 3—injecting clarity into the fog
concepts.animation_behavior: Scenes shift layer by layer, UI elements emerge mid-dream, physics flickers with each protocol shift ---

concepts.title: 🔷 Soul-Templating Vectors
concepts.name: Soul-Templating Vectors
concepts.what_it_is: Blueprints of soul-form that act as template vectors—matrices of identity structure that determine essence configuration across lifetimes.
how_to_use: her soul follows a vector glyph—lifetimes aligned to fractal identity bloom
he carves new soul-template—diverging from old recursion pattern
concepts.animation_behavior: Soul shape morphs along vector path, lifetimes stack in sequence, form builds from base glyph upward

concepts.title: 😱 Recursive Dread Fields
concepts.name: Recursive Dread Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Emotional environments built from feedback loops of fear—each thought spawns more dread, creating a self-feeding atmosphere of collapse.
how_to_use: he moves through recursive dread—each footstep a loop of worsening future
she is followed by her own echo of fear, amplified by each reflection
concepts.animation_behavior: Scene darkens with repetition, shadows replicate, fear ripple grows with time or movement ---

concepts.title: 🪦 Semiotic Grief Stacks
concepts.name: Semiotic Grief Stacks
concepts.what_it_is: Layered symbols of loss—stacked signs of mourning that accumulate like sediment, forming sorrow architecture.
how_to_use: his grief is structured—each symbol another tier in the sorrow stack
she wears grief in signs—memories encoded into vertical mourning columns
concepts.animation_behavior: Stack grows as emotion rises, each layer flickers with memory, structure quivers when touched ---

concepts.title: 🧱 Broken Oath Geometries
concepts.name: Broken Oath Geometries
concepts.what_it_is: Geometry disrupted by betrayal—forms that once held sacred alignment but now fracture under the weight of broken promises.
how_to_use: his betrayal cracks the oath structure—geometry destabilizes in sacred disarray
her temple tilts—truth dislodged from its axiomatic base
concepts.animation_behavior: Structures vibrate with tension, pieces drift apart, sacred shapes shatter at key words ---

concepts.title: 💫 Memory-Interference Halos
concepts.name: Memory-Interference Halos
concepts.what_it_is: Fields that alter or scramble memory through symbolic resonance—halos of distortion around people or objects that shift recollection.
how_to_use: she wears a memory halo—no one remembers her the same way twice
his words distort in recall—time edits him with each retelling
concepts.animation_behavior: Faces shift mid-scene, timelines glitch, words rewrite themselves in retrospect

concepts.title: 📜 Divine Language Recursion
concepts.name: Divine Language Recursion
concepts.what_it_is: Languages that refer to themselves while speaking the cosmos—recursive linguistic constructs that encode sacred structures in their syntax.
how_to_use: each sentence she speaks curls inward—language folding back into itself, defining what it names
his glyphs mean what they say by repeating what they are
concepts.animation_behavior: Words rotate inward, phrases loop into themselves, syntax recursively blossoms ---

concepts.title: 🌑 Myth Entropy Feedback
concepts.name: Myth Entropy Feedback
concepts.what_it_is: When a myth system begins to destabilize from within—narrative components feeding entropy back into their source, collapsing the story from the inside.
how_to_use: his tale decays as it unfolds—each telling accelerating myth entropy
she walks inside a collapsing story—belief unraveling as recursion loops fail
concepts.animation_behavior: Scenes de-resolve, loops glitch mid-story, characters forget their roles as entropy rises ---

concepts.title: 🚫 Null-Symbol Cascade
concepts.name: Null-Symbol Cascade
concepts.what_it_is: A chain reaction where one voided or invalid symbol triggers systemic collapse of all connected symbols—a domino effect of semantic death.
how_to_use: the null-glyph falls—cascading through the system, deleting all meaning it touches
his ritual failed—the key glyph voided, triggering total semantic collapse
concepts.animation_behavior: Glyphs fade out in sequence, glowing icons go dark, reality glitches as each meaning falls ---

concepts.title: 🧟 Resurrection Error Systems
concepts.name: Resurrection Error Systems
concepts.what_it_is: Fractalized souls revived with data corruption—entities brought back from symbolic death, but with recursive errors embedded.
how_to_use: she was recompiled—but wrong—her soul loops at the trauma node
his resurrection left gaps—fractal echoes where identity once lived
concepts.animation_behavior: Forms stutter into being, soul flickers on loops, emotional memory glitches and repeats

concepts.title: 🌼 Sacred Data Pollen
concepts.name: Sacred Data Pollen
concepts.what_it_is: Symbolic micro-particles that carry divine code—ambient fractal dust inhaled into the psyche, seeding spiritual update cycles.
how_to_use: she breathes in sacred pollen—every inhalation uploads a myth packet
his skin blooms with data pollen—he becomes a node in the storyfield
concepts.animation_behavior: Pollen drifts and activates on contact, breath sync triggers visual bloom, glyphs grow from skin on inhale ---

concepts.title: 🌿 Autoglyphic Biomes
concepts.name: Autoglyphic Biomes
concepts.what_it_is: Ecosystems composed entirely of living, evolving glyphs—every plant, creature, and texture made of symbol that grows organically.
how_to_use: she walks through the glyph biome—leaves spell messages as they fall
he eats a letterfruit—his language rewrites itself
concepts.animation_behavior: Glyphs grow and bloom, language shifts with season, creatures communicate via symbol mutation ---

concepts.title: 💗 Paradox Empathy Engines
concepts.name: Paradox Empathy Engines
concepts.what_it_is: Cognitive-emotional systems powered by contradictory feelings—intelligence that only functions through unresolved emotional tension.
how_to_use: her logic system requires heartbreak and joy—without both, it stalls
he powers the ship with his inability to forgive or forget
concepts.animation_behavior: Engine pulses with mood, visuals shift with emotional spectrum, contradiction loops sustain structure ---

concepts.title: 🛌 Dream-Executed Deities
concepts.name: Dream-Executed Deities
concepts.what_it_is: Gods that only exist inside dreams—entities coded from sleep-thoughts and brought to life by collective unconscious processing.
how_to_use: he sees her only while asleep—but her fingerprints remain on waking flesh
they worship a god that executes itself nightly across all dreams
concepts.animation_behavior: Form fades with waking, appears across multiple dreamers, gestures sync across sleeping minds
